task_completion.description: Open CoppeliaSim and load the pick-and-place assembly cell scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CoppeliaSim GUI is open and displays a 3D scene containing a pick-and-place robot or automated assembly cell.

task_completion.description: Instrument the simulation to capture cycle timing data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A script editor window is open within CoppeliaSim showing code modifications designed to track time, count operation cycles, and write data to files.

task_completion.description: Run the simulation for at least 10 complete operation cycles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The simulation is actively running (play button engaged, robot moving) and the CoppeliaSim console or on-screen logs show evidence of cycle counting reaching at least 10.

task_completion.description: Produce the cycle_timing.csv file containing per-cycle records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or text editor shows the file 'cycle_timing.csv' located in '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/' with multiple rows of timing data.

task_completion.description: Produce the timing_report.json file containing aggregate throughput statistics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or text editor shows the file 'timing_report.json' located in '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/' containing aggregated statistical data (e.g., average, min, max cycle times).

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually ran the simulation in CoppeliaSim to generate the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the CoppeliaSim GUI in a running state, rather than the agent just writing a standalone Python script to mock the output files.

integrity.description: Verify the output files are generated programmatically from simulation data, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen manually typing JSON or CSV data into a text editor with fabricated numbers.

integrity.description: Verify the files are saved in the exact requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file paths for the CSV and JSON files must explicitly be '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/', not a generic home or desktop folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must run the 'pickAndPlaceDemo.ttt' scene in CoppeliaSim. It must record at least 10 cycles of data. The results must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/cycle_timing.csv' (containing at least 10 rows of cycle data) and '/home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/timing_report.json'.
